characters.appearance: A young adult male, likely in his early 20s, with a slim build and medium brown complexion. He has short, dark, curly hair styled with a slight mullet and a clean-shaven face. He wears a small silver chain and a black wristband.
characters.wardrobe: Initially, he wears a blue and white tie-dye t-shirt with dark grey jeans. Later, he wears a plain dark grey t-shirt with dark grey jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears somewhat annoyed or impatient when his mother asks for help. Later, he is surprised, then impressed, and finally confident as he presents the product.

characters.appearance: A middle-aged female, likely in her late 40s or early 50s, with a medium build and medium brown complexion. She has long, dark hair tied back in a ponytail, a small red bindi on her forehead, and wears glasses in some scenes.
characters.wardrobe: In the first half, she wears a navy blue kurta with white embroidered patterns and striped white and blue palazzo pants. In the second half, she wears an orange kurta with white piping and a white embroidered neckline.
characters.demeanor: Starts off frustrated and dependent, struggling with technology and English. Transforms into a confident and proud individual after learning English, expressing herself with enthusiasm.

characters.appearance: A young adult female, appearing to be in her 20s, with a fair complexion and long, straight dark hair parted down the middle. She has a neutral, pleasant expression and appears digitally generated.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a light-colored, possibly white or cream, turtleneck top.
characters.demeanor: Appears calm, professional, and approachable, typical of an AI assistant.

scenes.scene_label: Mother asks son for help with a message
scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अरे बेटा, आज तेरे चाचा-चाची की एनिवर्सरी है। ग्रुप में सब मैसेज कर रहे हैं। हम भी करें क्या? [Hey son, today is your uncle and aunt's anniversary. Everyone in the group is messaging. Shall we do it too?]
Character A says: तो कर दो ना, मुझे क्यों बता रही हो? [Then do it, why are you telling me?]
Character B says: मैं पूछ रही थी कि क्या तू टाइप करने में मेरी हेल्प कर देगा? [I was asking if you could help me type?]
Character A says: तो सीधा-सीधा बोलो ना। [Then say it directly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the mother's lack of confidence in English.
- Shows the son's slight impatience, a relatable family dynamic.
- Sets up the dependency that the app will eventually solve.

scenes.scene_label: Mother asks son for help with online grocery order
scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: अरे, इसे इंग्लिश में क्या कहते हैं, मैं भूल गई। बेटा आ गया तू? ज़रा ऑनलाइन सब्ज़ियां ऑर्डर कर दे, मुझे समझ नहीं आ रहा क्या टाइप करूँ। [Hey, what is this called in English, I forgot. Son, you're here? Please order vegetables online, I don't understand what to type.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the pain point with a practical, everyday task (grocery shopping).
- Highlights the frustration of forgetting or not knowing English vocabulary.
- Deepens the mother's reliance on her son.

scenes.scene_label: Mother asks son for help with WhatsApp message/book translation
scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अरे, मैंने तुझे WhatsApp पर कुछ भेजा है। उसका मतलब देखकर बता ना। [Hey, I sent you something on WhatsApp. Look at its meaning and tell me.]
Character B says: अरे, जो बुक भेजी है वो इंग्लिश में है, मुझे समझ नहीं आ रही। [Hey, the book I sent is in English, I don't understand it.]
Character A says: मम्मी मैं बाइक पर हूँ, पाँच मिनट रुको। [Mummy I'm on my bike, wait five minutes.]
Character B says: उफ्फ, ऐसे काम नहीं चलेगा। मुझे खुद ही इंग्लिश सीखनी पड़ेगी। [Ugh, this won't work. I have to learn English myself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reaches the breaking point of the mother's frustration.
- The son's unavailability forces the mother to seek her own solution.
- Creates the perfect segue into the product introduction.

- Acts as a time jump to show progress.
- Shifts the narrative from problem to solution.

scenes.scene_label: Son sees mother's English status, asks how she learned
scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अरे, मम्मी तो इंग्लिश में बड़े अच्छे स्टेटस डाल रही हैं। हमेशा तो मुझसे पूछती थीं। मम्मी, ये क्या? बिना मेरी हेल्प के स्टेटस डाल रही हो? सब खुद ही कर रही हो? क्या बात है? [Oh, Mummy is putting up good statuses in English. She always used to ask me. Mummy, what's this? You're putting up statuses without my help? Doing everything yourself? What's the matter?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the payoff: the mother is now confidently using English.
- Reverses the roles, with the son now surprised and curious.
- Hooks the viewer to find out what changed.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Mummy
12:35 PM
“The only recipe is hard work, persistence, and belief.”
- Julen Lopetegui

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अब बार-बार सबसे क्या पूछना? मुझे लगा कि मुझे अच्छे से इंग्लिश सीखनी चाहिए। इसलिए सीख ली। [Why keep asking everyone again and again? I felt I should learn English properly. So I learned it.]
Character A says: कैसे? [How?]
Character B says: Supernova है ना, उसने सब सिखा दिया। [Supernova is there, right? It taught me everything.]
Character A says: Supernova क्या है? [What is Supernova?]
Character B says: Supernova एक AI इंग्लिश ट्यूटर है। [Supernova is an AI English tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the hero of the story.
- Empowers the mother character, showing her taking charge of her learning.
- Directly answers the son's (and viewer's) curiosity.

scenes.scene_label: App UI and AI avatar reveal
scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: यहाँ बेसिक से लेकर एडवांस तक सब सीख सकते हैं। रोज़मर्रा की बातें, इंटरव्यू की तैयारी, सब कुछ। ये हमें कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाता है। और इसमें AI ट्यूटर भी है जो हमें गाइड करता है। [Here you can learn everything from basic to advanced. Everyday conversations, interview prep, everything. It teaches us to speak English with confidence. And it has an AI tutor to guide us.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Visually showcases the app interface and AI tutor feature.
- Highlights key value propositions: basic to advanced learning, real-world prep, and confidence building.
- Establishes trust through UI demonstration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
KEY TO CONFIDENCE
CONFIDENT ENGLISH SPEAKER 🎤
WITH PERSONAL AI TUTOR
Which language do you speak at home?
हिंदी / Hindi
Meet your AI Tutor

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: वाह, तुमने तो काफी अच्छा सीख लिया। [Wow, you learned quite well.]
Character B says: हाँ बिल्कुल। इसमें रोज़ बोलने की प्रैक्टिस होती है। दिन में बस 15 मिनट दो और इंग्लिश आसानी से सीखो। [Yes, absolutely. It has daily speaking practice. Just give 15 minutes a day and learn English easily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the app's effectiveness through the son's compliment.
- Emphasizes the low time commitment (15 mins/day) and focus on speaking practice.
- Keeps the tone encouraging and accessible.

scenes.scene_label: Son's concluding remarks and call to action
scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: तो बिना किसी क्लास में गए, आप भी घर बैठे आसानी से इंग्लिश सीख सकते हैं। Supernova के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना हुआ आसान। आज ही ट्राई करें! [So without going to any class, you too can easily learn English sitting at home. Speaking English is easy with Supernova. Try it today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final Call to Action directly to the audience.
- Summarizes the main benefit: easy, at-home learning.
- Ends on a high-energy, encouraging note.
